title: Israel Stunned by Trump’s Iran Deal
summary_full: Analysts said the agreement accomplishes none of Israel’s war aims and leaves the country in worse shape on each of them.
summary_public: Analysts said the agreement accomplishes none of Israel’s war aims and leaves the country in worse shape on each of them.
